traceability.md's AC → TEST → Task table maps AC-001..AC-019 each to exactly one task, and each mapped task's Done When list explicitly names that AC (e.g. T-001 Done When cites AC-002/003/004/005/017/018; T-002 cites AC-006/007/008/009/010/019; T-003 cites AC-011/014; T-004 cites AC-001; T-007 cites AC-015; T-008 cites AC-013/016; T-005 cites AC-012). Every task (T-001, T-002, T-003, T-004, T-007, T-008, T-005, T-006) has a non-empty Requirements: field citing at least one REQ-NNN. No orphan tasks found.

No task title contains 'test'/'spec'/'verify' in a way that marks it as a pure test task without AC coverage. T-005's scope is exclusively tests/golden/ (test-file-only scope) but its Done When explicitly references AC-012 (REQ-009), so it is not orphaned. No orphan test tasks found.

Attempt 1 / round 3 (subsequent-round rule applies per invocation context). All 8 tasks declare 'Approval: Draft' (not Approved) and 'Status: Planned' (a valid member of {Planned, In Progress, Blocked}).

All 8 tasks declare Risk and Required Workflow with correct risk-gate-matrix pairing: T-001/T-002/T-003/T-004/T-007 = high/tdd; T-008/T-005 = medium/acceptance-first; T-006 = low/test-after. Matches precheck-result.json workflow_match_precheck: PASS.

Each AC-NNN (AC-001..AC-019) is claimed as primary test target by exactly one task per traceability.md's AC→TEST→Task table and confirmed by each task's own Done When list; no AC appears in more than one task's Done When.

Every task ID referenced in a Blockers: field (T-001, T-002, T-003, T-004, T-005, T-007, T-008) exists in dependency-graph.json's nodes array (['T-001','T-002','T-003','T-004','T-007','T-008','T-005','T-006']) and in tasks.md. No dangling blocker references.

BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS, so this check runs. dependency-graph.json edges form a DAG with a valid topological order T-001 < T-002 < T-003 < T-004 < T-007 < T-008 < T-005 < T-006 (T-001 has no outgoing edges; every other edge points strictly earlier in this order). No cycle detected.

T-006 ('ドキュメント + traceability 最終化') combines documentation updates with traceability finalization, matching the calibration's explicit allowed exemplar 'Migrate schema and update traceability.md' (mandatory housekeeping). T-004's title ('ツール登録と統合応答') couples tool registration with response assembly for the same external endpoint, a single coherent integration concern. T-001/T-002/T-003/T-008 combine tightly related sub-parts of one REQ cluster (per-artifact engine+digest+verdict skeleton; the three internal invariants; signature boundary+its static verification; determinism/smoke+dist rebuild) rather than two unrelated feature concerns. No violation found.

No Done When item uses forbidden vague verbs/phrases ('ensure', 'consider', unqualified 'update X', 'verify is correct', 'works correctly', unqualified 'review X', unqualified 'confirm X'). Each non-documentation task names a concrete verification artifact or command (e.g. T-001/T-002/T-003/T-004/T-007 name reports/implementation/evidence-deep-verify-T-NNN.md and specific AC-tied test outcomes; T-004 names 'tests/tools のエラー系テスト green'; T-008 names 'dist-parity CI が green'). T-006 (documentation-only) names exact files (README.md/USERGUIDE.md) plus a concrete report artifact (reports/implementation/evidence-deep-verify-T-006.md), satisfying the calibration's 'exact files or sections' allowance for doc-only tasks.

All 8 task IDs in tasks.md have corresponding rows in traceability.md's Task→REQ table (stated as 'tasks.md の 8 タスクに対応する'). All REQ IDs in traceability.md (REQ-001..REQ-013) exist in requirements.md.
